options.label: [Banana]
notes: If the player's HP is not divisble by 3, the HP gain is rounded down.

options.label: [Donut]
notes: Like all HP gain, the extra hit points are healed when you get them.

options.label: [Box]
options.description: Obtain a Relic. Become Cursed -  Regret.
effects: The Relic is a randomly selected Common, Uncommon, or Rare Relic.
You are then given the option to

dead_adventurer.name: Dead Adventurer

options.label: [Search]
options.description: Find Loot. 25% (A15+: 35%) chance: Elite monster returns.
effects: Each [Search] attempt either triggers an Act 1 Elite fight OR yields one of these rewards: 30 Gold, a random Relic, or Nothing.
Each reward can only be found once per event.
Rewards found before fighting the Elite are removed from its combat drops.
Each subsequent [Search] increases Elite encounter chance by +25% (cumulative: 25%→50%→75%).
If all 3 searches succeed without Elite encounter, event ends successfully.

random_outcomes.effect: Fight random Act 1 Elite (Gremlin Nob, Lagavulin, or Sentries). Lagavulin is NOT asleep and uses Siphon Soul turn 1.
Receive one of: 30 Gold, random Relic, or Nothing (each reward once only)

options.label: [Continue]
effects: Same as [Search] but with increased Elite encounter chance (+25% cumulative)
notes: Only appears after a successful [Search] that didn't trigger Elite
Black Star will not cause the Elite to drop an additional Relic. However, the other "elite relics"  Preserved Insect,  Sling of Courage, and  Slaver's Collar will work as expected.

It is quite unlikely for the player to be able to [Search] three times without being ambushed since they must succeed on all three searches with increasing chances of failure. See the table below for more information:
Cumulative Chance of Avoiding the Elite
Number of Searches(% chance of Elite returning)

face_trader.name: Face Trader

options.label: [Touch]
effects: X is equal to 10% of the player's Max HP, rounded down.

options.label: [Trade]
effects: Receive one of the following special Relics:
Face of Cleric (good face)
Ssserpent Head (good face)
Gremlin Visage (bad face)
N'loth's Hungry Face (bad face)
Cultist Headpiece (neutral face)
Face of Cleric (good face)
Ssserpent Head (good face)
Gremlin Visage (bad face)
N'loth's Hungry Face (bad face)
Cultist Headpiece (neutral face)

notes: The chances stated by the Event are inaccurate. The actual chances are 40% good face, 40% bad face, and 20% neutral face ( Cultist Headpiece).
All 5 masks have the same probability of being chosen.

golden_idol_event.name: Golden Idol (Event)

options.label: [Take]
options.description: Obtain  Golden Idol. Trigger a trap.

options.label: [Smash]
effects: X is equal to 25% (A15+: 35%) of the player's Max HP.

options.label: [Hide]
effects: X is equal to 8% (A15+: 10%) of the player's Max HP.

variable_x.description: X = 8% (A15+: 10%) of Max HP, min 5 HP, max 40 HP

notes: Forgotten Altar will allow  Golden Idol to be exchanged for  Bloody Idol.
The Moai Head will allow  Golden Idol to be exchanged for 333 Gold.

options.label: [Stomp]
effects: Enter a battle against 3  Fungi Beasts. Winning grants the exclusive Relic  Odd Mushroom along with regular combat rewards.

options.label: [Eat]
options.description: Heal X HP. Become Cursed -  Parasite.
effects: X is equal to 25% of the player's max HP.

options.label: [Forget]
options.description: Remove a card from your deck.

options.label: [Change]
options.description: Transform a card in your deck.

options.label: [Grow]
options.description: Upgrade a card in your deck.

scrap_ooze.name: Scrap Ooze

options.label: [Reach Inside]
options.description: Lose 3 (A15+: 5) HP. 25% chance to find a Relic.
notes: If you fail to find a Relic, you can try again until you find one. Each time you fail, the HP loss is increased by 1 and the chance to gain a Relic increases by 10%.
Chance of Finding the Relicon This Attempt
Chance of Having Found the Relicby This Attempt (i.e. Cumulative Chance)

options.label: [Enter]
options.description: Upgrade 2 random cards. Lose X HP.
effects: X is equal to 20% (A15+: 30%) of the player's max HP.

options.label: [Heal]
effects: X is equal to 25% of the player's Max HP, rounded down.

options.label: [Purify]
options.description: 50 (A15+: 75) Gold: Remove a card from your deck.

options.label: [Disagree]
effects: You are then given the option to

wing_statue.name: Wing Statue

options.label: [Pray]
options.description: Remove a card from your deck. Lose 7 HP.

options.label: [Destroy]
notes: Requires: Attack card with 10+ base damage (single hit, not multi-hit like Twin Strike).
If condition not met, shows as [Locked] Requires: Card with 10 or more damage.

The event specifically only checks Attack cards in the player's deck, despite only stating "Cards" in general. It also only checks whether the card's base damage is 10 or more. This means that any card that can only achieve 10 or more damage through the use of multi-hits (such as  Twin Strike and  Riddle with Holes) or that have damage which is dynamically calculated from certain conditions in combat (such as  Perfected Strike and  Mind Blast) do not meet the requirement.
The following is a list of cards that satisfy the condition of "Requires: Card with 10 or more damage." for the [Destroy] option:
Cards With 10 or More Damage After Being Upgraded
The following is a list of cards that satisfy the condition of "Requires: Card with 10 or more damage." for the [Destroy] option only after they have been  Upgraded to increase their base damage:

options.label: [Leave It]
effects: X is a random number between 20 and 50 (A15+: 35 and 75) Gold. X cannot be more Gold than the player currently has.

options.label: [Elegance]
options.description: Remove a card from your deck.

options.label: [Simplicity]
effects: All of the player's basic Strikes and basic Defends are  Upgraded.

options.label: [Test J.A.X.]
effects: Adds  J.A.X. to the player's deck.

variable_x.description: J.A.X. card adds X Strength where X is its upgrade level

options.label: [Become Test Subject]
effects: Read more on Transform rules here.

options.label: [Ingest Mutagens]
effects: Rewards the player with  Mutagenic Strength.

options.label: [Accept]
options.description: Receive 5 (A15+: 3) Apparitions. Lose X Max HP.
effects: X is equal to 50% of the player's Max HP, rounded up.

options.label: [Refuse]
effects: You are then given the option to

cursed_tome.name: Cursed Tome

options.label: [Read]
options.description: Begin reading the tome (starts the event sequence).

options.label: [Take]
effects: Receive one random book relic: Enchiridion, Nilry's Codex, or Necronomicon.
Player doesn't know which book until after choosing [Take].
Total HP cost if committed: 16 (A15+: 21) HP (1+2+3+10/15)

options.label: [Stop]
options.description: Lose 3 HP. Give up on the book.
effects: Exit without obtaining the book relic.

notes: This is a SEQUENTIAL event: [Read] → [Continue] x3 → [Take]/[Stop]. Player can [Leave] only at the start.
Tungsten Rod reduces total HP lost by 4 (to 12/17) if player takes the book, or to 5 if player stops.
Practical summary: Either commit to 16 (A15+: 21) HP for random book relic, or [Leave] immediately for 0 cost.

options.label: [Adjustments]
options.description: Lose 40 (A15+: 50) Gold. One of the following rewards appears.
effects: Upgrade a card.
Upgrade two random cards.

options.label: [Clean Up]
options.description: Lose 60 (A15+: 75) Gold. One of the following rewards appears.
effects: Remove a card.
Transform two cards.

options.label: [Full Service]
options.description: Lose 90 (A15+: 110) Gold.  Remove a card, then upgrade a random card.

forgotten_altar.name: Forgotten Altar

options.label: [Offer: Golden Idol]
options.description: Obtain a special Relic (Bloody Idol). Lose Golden Idol.
effects: Receive Bloody Idol relic
Golden Idol is consumed

options.label: [Sacrifice]
options.description: Gain 5 Max HP. Lose X HP.
effects: X is equal to 25% (A15+: 35%) of the player's Max HP.

notes: Golden Idol is only obtained from the  Golden Idol Event.
If the  Golden Idol is turned into the  Bloody Idol,  The Moai Head Event in Act 3 will no longer accept it as an offering.

knowing_skull.name: Knowing Skull

loop_mechanic.description: Event repeats until [How do I leave?] is chosen

options.label: [A Pick Me Up?]
options.description: Get a Potion. Lose X HP.
notes: Works even with full potion slots or Sozu - still pay HP cost

options.label: [Success?]
options.description: Get a Colorless card. Lose X HP.

notes: Bloody Idol can greatly increase the number of times the player can choose [Riches?] since they will heal 5 HP every time it gives them Gold.
Tungsten Rod will reduce the HP lost by 1 every time an option is selected.

masked_bandits.name: Masked Bandits

options.label: [Fight!]
effects: Starts a combat against the three bandits ( Pointy,  Romeo, and  Bear). Upon winning, obtain regular card rewards, 25 - 35 Gold, and  Red Mask.

notes: Although the fight can be quite dangerous and offers a Relic reward, it does not count as an Elite combat for the sake of  Preserved Insect,  Sling of Courage,  Black Star, and  Slaver's Collar.
If the player has  Red Mask, the Act 3 Event  Tomb of Lord Red Mask will have an option to gain 222 Gold for free.

nloth.name: N'loth

options.label: [Offer: Relic A]
options.description: Lose this relic. Obtain a special relic.

options.label: [Offer: Relic B]
options.description: Lose this relic. Obtain a special relic.
effects: Rewards the player with  N'loth's Gift.

notes: N'loth can pick Relics that activate their effects only upon being picked up, as well as used-up Relics.
For example, offering Relics like  Mango or  Old Coin will not remove the max HP or Gold granted by them, effectively removing the downside of  N'loth's Gift.

options.label: [Offer Gold]
options.description: 75 Gold: Remove a card from your deck.

pleading_vagrant.name: Pleading Vagrant

options.label: [Offer Gold]
notes: If the player does not have enough Gold, this option will be greyed out.

options.label: [Rob]
options.description: Obtain a Relic. Become Cursed -  Shame.

notes: Omamori can be used to prevent the  Shame from [Rob] if it has any charges remaining.

the_colosseum.name: The Colosseum

options.label: [Fight]
options.description: Fight Blue Slaver and Red Slaver (no rewards).
effects: Mandatory fight - no escape option.
End-of-combat effects (Burning Blood, Self Repair) still trigger.
Smoke Bomb can be used to flee but still proceeds to Phase 2.

options.label: [COWARDICE]
effects: Event ends with no additional rewards.

options.label: [VICTORY]
options.description: Fight Taskmaster and Gremlin Nob for massive rewards.
effects: Rewards: 100 Gold, 1 Rare Relic, 1 Uncommon Relic, card reward, possible Potion.
Treated as Elite combat (Preserved Insect, Sling of Courage, Slaver's Collar work).
Black Star does NOT double relics (always exactly 1 Rare + 1 Uncommon).

notes: This is a TWO-PHASE event: Phase 1 (mandatory fight) → Phase 2 (escape or glory).
Both fights can trigger Potion drop roll, but Phase 1 potion is never shown.
Phase 2 [VICTORY] fight is one of the best reward opportunities in Act 2.

the_joust.name: The Joust

options.label: [Owner]
effects: There is no option to avoid betting.

notes: If the player possesses  Ectoplasm, this event is a mandatory loss of 50 Gold. There is no option to leave the event without betting, and any potential winnings cannot be gained.
The player may consider using the expected value (EV) of each option to determine who they want to bet on.
The EV of betting on the Murderer is a net increase of 20 Gold (a 70% chance to receive 100 Gold is an expected 70 Gold, minus the 50 Gold that was bet. 0.7 x 100 - 50 = 20)
The EV of betting on the Owner is a net increase of 25 Gold (a 30% chance to receive 250 Gold is an expected 75 Gold, minus the 50 Gold that was bet. 0.3 x 250 - 50 = 25)

It may be more beneficial to ignore the EV and instead consider whether the relatively safe 50 extra Gold by betting on the Murderer is more useful to the player's current run compared to risking the bet on the Owner and likely losing their 50 Gold for the more unlikely net gain of 200 Gold.

the_library.name: The Library

options.label: [Read]
options.description: Choose 1 of 20 cards to add to your deck.

options.label: [Sleep]
effects: X is equal to 33% (A15+: 20%) of the player's Max HP.

notes: [Sleep] is unaffected by  Regal Pillow, does not trigger  Dream Catcher, and can still be chosen with  Coffee Dripper.
Mark of the Bloom makes [Sleep] serve only as a way to skip adding a card to your deck as it will no longer heal you.
N'loth's Gift increases the likelihood of each card offered by [Read] being Rare.

the_mausoleum.name: The Mausoleum

options.label: [Open Coffin]
options.description: Obtain a Relic. 50% (A15+: 100%): Become Cursed -  Writhe

notes: If the player receives  Omamori as the Relic reward, it will not prevent the  Writhe from being gained.
If the player receives  Darkstone Periapt as the Relic reward, it will grant the +6 Max HP.

options.label: [Offer: Blood Vial]
options.description: Lose  Blood Vial.  Remove all  Strikes. Receive 5  Bites.

options.label: [Accept]
options.description: Remove all  Strikes. Receive 5  Bites. Lose X Max HP.
effects: X is equal to 30% of the player's max HP.

options.label: [Refuse]
effects: You are then given the option to

falling.name: Falling

options.label: [Land]
effects: Removes a random Skill from deck (shown in option text)
If no eligible Skill exists, this option becomes [Locked] Requires: Skill Card
notes: Requires at least one Skill card not targeted by Bottled Lightning

options.label: [Channel]
effects: Removes a random Power from deck (shown in option text)
If no eligible Power exists, this option becomes [Locked] Requires: Power Card
notes: Requires at least one Power card not targeted by Bottled Tornado

options.label: [Strike]
effects: Removes a random Attack from deck (shown in option text)
If no eligible Attack exists, this option becomes [Locked] Requires: Attack Card
notes: Requires at least one Attack card not targeted by Bottled Flame

options.label: [Land] (Special)
effects: No card is lost, player continues safely
notes: Only appears if player has NO eligible cards of any type (e.g., very small deck with only bottled cards)
Each option shows the specific card that will be lost
Bottled cards (Bottled Flame/Lightning/Tornado targets) are protected from removal
Player chooses which card type to sacrifice

mind_bloom.name: Mind Bloom

options.label: [I am War]
options.description: Fight a random Boss from Act 1. Obtain a Rare Relic.
effects: Enter combat with a random Act 1 boss (can be the same one you fought or a different one)
After defeating the boss, receive: Rare Relic (as loot drop), normal combat rewards, and 50 Gold (25 on A15+)

options.label: [I am Awake]
options.description: Upgrade all cards. You can no longer heal.
effects: All cards in deck are upgraded
Obtain Mark of the Bloom relic (prevents ALL healing)
Lizard Tail and Fairy in a Bottle become useless (cannot restore HP)
If you lose Mark of the Bloom (e.g., via N'loth event), healing is restored

options.label: [I am Rich]
effects: Omamori can block one or both Normality curses
notes: Replaced by [I am Healthy] on floor 41+

options.label: [I am Healthy]
options.description: Heal to full HP. Become Cursed - Doubt.
notes: Replaces [I am Rich] on higher floors
Always shows exactly 3 options: [I am War], [I am Awake], and either [I am Rich] or [I am Healthy] based on floor
[I am Awake] disqualifies you from the 'Who Needs Relics?' achievement (due to Mark of the Bloom)
[I am War] boss fight triggers Pantograph and Slaver's Collar as if it were a normal end-of-Act boss
Omamori can prevent Normality curses from [I am Rich], making it nearly free 999 Gold
This is often one of the last opportunities to encounter Curses in a run

mysterious_sphere.name: Mysterious Sphere

options.label: [Open Sphere]
effects: The player enters combat with the 2  Orb Walkers. In addition to the the Rare Relic, the combat rewards also yield 45-55 Gold, a normal card reward, and potentially a Potion just like a normal combat.

notes: Although the fight can be quite dangerous and offers a Relic reward, it does not count as an Elite combat for the sake of  Preserved Insect,  Sling of Courage,  Black Star, and  Slaver's Collar.

secret_portal.name: Secret Portal

options.label: [Enter the Portal]
effects: The player is put directly into combat with the Act 3 boss at the end of the act.

notes: Apart from the unusual method of entering the boss floor and skipping the rest of Act 3, entering the portal is otherwise a completely normal boss fight.
Pantograph and  Slaver's Collar trigger as expected.
There will still be the double boss afterwards on A20.

Defeating the boss (or both bosses on A20) will still allow the player to enter Act 4 if they have all required Keys. Although, the player should be careful to collect the Ruby Key from a Rest Site prior to the event since they will skip the guaranteed Rest Site before the boss (which is often relied on as the last opportunity to collect the Ruby Key).
The player's current floor is only increased by 1, which causes them to fight the Act 3 Boss earlier than the usual floor 50.

sensory_stone.name: Sensory Stone

options.label: [Recall]
options.description: Add 1 Colorless card to your deck.
notes: The player is presented with 1 card reward that can only offer Uncommon Colorless cards and Rare Colorless cards.

options.label: [Recall]
options.description: Add 2 Colorless cards to your deck. Lose 5 HP.
notes: The player is presented with 2 card rewards that can only offer Uncommon Colorless cards and Rare Colorless cards.

options.label: [Recall]
options.description: Add 3 Colorless cards to your deck. Lose 5 HP.
notes: The player is presented with 3 card rewards that can only offer Uncommon Colorless cards and Rare Colorless cards.
Since the Colorless cards are actually card rewards, they are affected by Relics which modify card rewards in some way.
Question Card makes each card reward present the player with 1 additional card.
Singing Bowl can allow the player to skip each card reward in order to gain +2 Max HP.
Busted Crown makes each card reward present the player with 2 fewer cards.
N'loth's Gift increases the likelihood of each card being a Rare Colorless card.

the_moai_head.name: The Moai Head

options.label: [Jump Inside]
options.description: Heal to full HP. Lose X Max HP.
effects: X = 12.5% (A15+: 18%) of player's Max HP.
Healing is blocked by Mark of the Bloom.

variable_x.description: X = 12.5% of Max HP, minimum 5, maximum 50

options.label: [Offer: Golden Idol]
options.description: Receive 333 Gold. Lose Golden Idol relic.

notes: Golden Idol is acquired from the Act 1 event 'Golden Idol'.
This is the LAST opportunity to trade Golden Idol (other was Forgotten Altar in Act 2).
333 Gold from [Offer] far exceeds any remaining combat Gold gains at this point in Act 3.

tomb_of_lord_red_mask.name: Tomb of Lord Red Mask

options.label: [Don the Red Mask]
effects: Player keeps the Red Mask relic.
Gold is a pure reward for owning the relic.

options.label: [Offer: X Gold]
options.description: Lose all Gold. Obtain Red Mask relic.
effects: X = all of player's current Gold
Receive Red Mask relic

variable_x.description: X = All Gold (if no Red Mask)

notes: This event has TWO branches based on Red Mask ownership:
WITH Red Mask: Options are [Don the Red Mask] (222 Gold) or [Leave]
WITHOUT Red Mask: Options are [Offer: X Gold] (buy Red Mask) or [Leave]. [Don the Red Mask] shows as [Locked] Requires: Red Mask
Red Mask is obtained from the Act 2 event Masked Bandits.

winding_halls.name: Winding Halls

options.label: [Embrace Madness]
effects: X is equal to 12.5% (A15+: 18%) of the player's Max HP.

options.label: [Focus]
options.description: Become Cursed -  Writhe. Heal X HP.
effects: X is equal to 25% (A15+: 20%) of the player's Max HP.

options.label: [Retrace Your Steps]
effects: X is equal to 5% of the player's Max HP.

notes: Omamori can be used to prevent the  Writhe from [Focus] if it has any charges remaining. This is likely one of the last opportunities for the player to be able to benefit from  Omamori.

a_note_for_yourself.name: A Note For Yourself

options.label: [Take and Give]
effects: Receive a card that you had stored previously, and store a card in your deck in return.
First encounter in save file: Iron Wave is stored by default.

notes: This event can store a card between runs, allows obtaining cards from different characters.
On A14 or lower: Must have beaten that Ascension level on chosen character to encounter.
On A15 or higher: This event cannot be encountered.
Playing the Daily Climb also disables this event.
Upgraded cards and Searing Blow upgrade levels are preserved when stored.
Retrieving a card triggers relics: Molten Egg, Toxic Egg, Frozen Egg, Ceramic Fish.

bonfire_spirits.name: Bonfire Spirits

options.label: [Offer]
options.description: Receive a reward based on the offer.

rewards.card: depends on the rarity of the

effects: Offer a card in your deck to remove. The reward you receive depends on the rarity of the card you give.

notes: This event is one of those that treats Basic cards as a lower quality than Common.
Obtaining  Spirit Poop adds the Poopy Score bonus which lowers your total score by one.

options.label: [Pray]
options.description: Duplicate a card in your deck.

options.label: [Desecrate]
effects: Regret -  Unplayable. At the end of your turn, lose HP equal to the number of cards in your hand.

options.label: [Search]
effects: Opens a rewards menu with three (two 15) random Potions. These can be skipped.

match_and_keep.name: Match and Keep

minigame.simulation_note: For AI simulation, treat as probabilistic: expected ~2-3 matches with random play, skilled play can match all 6

options.label: [Play]
options.description: Play a memory matching game for cards.

notes: Match pairs of cards to add them to your deck
12 cards total, 6 pairs, 5 attempts to flip
Always includes 1 Colorless card pair and 1 Curse pair

options.label: [Forge]
options.description: Upgrade a card in your deck.

options.label: [Rummage]
options.description: Obtain a special relic. Become Cursed -  Pain.
effects: Warped Tongs - At the start of your turn,  Upgrade a random card in your hand for the rest of combat.
Pain -  Unplayable. While in hand, lose 1 HP whenever you play another card.

purifier.name: Purifier

options.label: [Pray]
options.description: Remove a card from your deck.

notes: This probably would not work as an air purifier.

the_divine_fountain.name: The Divine Fountain

options.label: [Drink]
options.description: Remove all Curses from your deck.

notes: Removing all Curses may not be beneficial if you are relying on the  Strength from  Du-Vu Doll.
The Max HP gain from  Darkstone Periapt is kept even when the Curses are removed.

the_woman_in_blue.name: The Woman in Blue
notes: Even if you skip grabbing the potions you bought, she will still be satisfied.

options.label: [Pray]
effects: Read more on Transform rules here.

we_meet_again.name: We Meet Again!

options.label: [Give Potion]
options.description: Lose a chosen potion. Obtain a Relic.
effects: The event will randomly choose a potion upon entry and tell you which one was selected. You will be unable to drink or discard that potion until you leave the event's floor.

options.label: [Give Gold]
effects: The amount of Gold lost is between 50 and 150 (or your current amount of Gold).

options.label: [Give Card]
options.description: Lose a chosen card. Obtain a Relic.
effects: The chosen card will not be Basic or a Curse.

notes: "mask wearing hoodlums" likely refers to the group of bandits in the Act 2 event  Masked Bandits.

wheel_of_change.name: Wheel of Change

options.label: [Play]
options.description: Spin the wheel for a random outcome.
effects: Spin a wheel containing 6 equally-weighted outcomes:
random_outcomes: Remove a card from your deck
Take 10% (A15+: 15%) of Max HP as damage

notes: All 6 outcomes have equal probability (1/6 each).
